questions.question: Describe the waste hierarchy as it pertains to waste management in the AEC industry, and explain how it can be applied to minimize waste and maximize environmental benefits. (2 marks)
questions.hint: Focus on the waste hierarchy principle

questions.question: What are the key components of a sustainable waste management plan for the AEC industry, and how can they be integrated into the design and construction process? (3 marks)
questions.hint: Focus on design, construction, and operational phases

questions.question: Compare and contrast two different waste management options (e.g. landfill disposal vs. recycling) and evaluate their environmental impacts on the AEC industry. (5 marks)
questions.hint: Focus on environmental sustainability and industry-wide implications
